headline: Assessing KLA (KLAC) Valuation As Recent Momentum Meets Conflicting Fair Value Estimates
summary: KLA overview and recent performance snapshot KLA (KLAC) has drawn investor attention after recent share price moves, with the stock last closing at $1,465. Over the past month and past 3 months, returns were 1.7% and 17.6% respectively. See our latest analysis for KLA. While the recent 1-month share price return of 1.7% might look modest, KLA’s 90-day share price return of 17.6% and 1-year total shareholder return of 116.9% suggest momentum has been strong over both shorter and longer...

headline: Cramer: Buy Western Digital, Micron, Seagate on oil-driven dips
summary: Jim Cramer has a shopping list ready. He just needs oil to hand him the sale. “Western Digital, Seagate, SanDisk, and Micron could all be bought on a big move down because of oil. headline: Shares of semiconductor companies are trading lower amid overall market weakness due to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. The industry may be pulling back due to high energy costs that may disrupt the chipmaking process.

headline: Chipmaking tool provider KLA unveils additional $7 billion share buyback and dividend increase
summary: Chipmaking tool provider KLA Corp on Thursday announced a new $7 billion stock buyback program ‌and a 21% increase in its quarterly dividend, while ‌reaffirming its forecast for the current quarter.  This buyback, with no specified timeframe, ​is in addition to the company's existing share repurchase authorization, which stood at $3.94 billion as of December 31, 2025.  KLA's shares have risen more than 20% this year, after a nearly ‌93% jump last year, ⁠driven by relentless investment in data center infrastructure for artificial intelligence tech and the chips that ⁠power it.

headline: KLA Hosts Investor Day; Announces $7 Billion Share Repurchase Program and 21% Increase to Quarterly Dividend; Reaffirms March 2026 Guidance
summary: KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) will hold its 2026 Investor Day today in New York City with presentations by Rick Wallace, President and Chief Executive Officer, Bren Higgins, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, and other senior executives of the Company. A live stream of the event will begin at 9:00 a.m. ET and conclude at approximately 12:30 p.m. ET. A link to the live stream and presentation materials can be found at ir.kla.com.
